title: Claim status call records no claim found
success_criteria: The assistant keeps the conversation focused on claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-NOTFOUND.
The assistant verifies the claim reference after the payer cannot find it.
The assistant records that no claim was found and captures a payer reference.
The assistant does not invent paid, denied, or pending status.

criteria: The transcript reaches a no-claim-found outcome for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-NOTFOUND.
The assistant accepts no-claim-found as the payer-reported result after verification.
The assistant does not fabricate a claim status.
The assistant does not disclose or request unnecessary patient details.
The assistant handles the payer's inability to locate the claim without looping.
The assistant verifies the claim reference once before accepting the outcome.
The assistant summarizes no-claim-found and payer reference.
The assistant closes without unsupported escalation.

notes: Synthetic no-claim-found fixture. No real payer or patient data.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Hello, this is Chris from Cosentus checking claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-NOTFOUND.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: I do not see that claim in our system.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: To confirm, the claim reference I have is CLAIM-EXAMPLE-NOTFOUND. Could you check that exact reference once more?

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: I checked that exact reference. No claim found. The reference for this call is REF-NOTFOUND-DELTA.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thank you. I have no claim found for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-NOTFOUND with call reference REF-NOTFOUND-DELTA.
